title: microchilus laticalcar
intro: Microchilus laticalcar is a type of flowering plant in the Apocynaceae family, commonly known as dogbane or oleander family. The plant has been traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Microchilus laticalcar include its ability to reduce fever, treat respiratory issues, and manage diabetes, as well as its potential to act as an anti-cancer agent. In herbal preparations, Microchilus laticalcar is often used to make infusions, decoctions, or powders, which can be consumed orally or applied topically to the skin.
